headline: Fastenal Q2 Earnings Meet Estimates, Sales Beat on Favorable Pricing
summary: FAST beats Q2 sales estimates as contract customer growth and digital sales gained momentum, but margin pressures and weaker cash flow weighed on the stock.

headline: AI in Mining Market to Surge from USD 2.60 Billion in 2025 to USD 9.93 Billion by 2032
summary: The AI in mining market is projected to bloom from USD 2.60 billion in 2025 to USD 9.93 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 21.1%. This growth is fueled by the rapid digital transformation, extensive deployment of IoT, cloud computing, and 5G connectivity in mining operations. Generative AI is poised to dominate the market by 2030, enhancing efficiency and predictive capabilities.
